user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the performance management notification templates list, so that I can manage all performance review notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Management Notification Templates screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Notification type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open and view a specific performance notification template such as Goal KRA Ratings Notification, so that I can review its content
acceptance_criteria: Given the performance notification templates are listed; When I click View on a row; Then the template content is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the performance notification templates list, so that I can access all 14 templates across pages
acceptance_criteria: Given the list shows 10 of 14 items; When I click Next; Then the following page of templates is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the performance notification templates list, so that I see the latest configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Management Notification Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to switch to the Email Templates view for performance management, so that I can manage emails alongside notifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Management Notification Templates screen; When I select the Email Templates tab; Then the email templates are shown
